descriptionShort: Dave Tomlinson delivers a speech during his 2025 Hall of Fame induction ceremony.
descriptionLong: Dave Tomlinson, a key member of the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes Centennial Cup championship team, shares remarks during his BC Hockey Hall of Fame induction on July 13, 2025. The video captures his speech at the commemoration event honoring the legendary junior-A roster.
